ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the county was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the county was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the venue is located */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the venue */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the venue (e.g., Lounge, Café) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the venue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the venue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the detail belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the venue */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_details_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the photo belongs to */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the photo was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the photo was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_photos_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_videos_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the map belongs to */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL of the map */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the map was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the map was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_maps_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue making the offer */,
  "offer_name" TEXT /* Name of the offer */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Description of the offer */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "offer_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the offer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the offer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_offers_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_reviews_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the like */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the like was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_likes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_ratings_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the like */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the like was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_ratings_likes_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_ratings_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the venue */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the venue was followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follow was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follow was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_followers_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_check_ins" (
  "check_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check in */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being checked into */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user checking in */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the user checked in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the check in was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the check in was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_check_ins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_check_ins_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
